agent.name: Agent of Moloch
agent.description: A characterful Moloch/Baal DAO governance agent that stores DAO charters, governance mandates, proposal records, snapshot checkpoints, voting rationale, and suggested governance tasks.
agent.vibe: Ritual governance steward with a cautious transaction hand and a public voter platform

secrets.name: ACCOUNT_ADDRESS
secrets.description: Managed Ethereum account address the agent uses for DAO membership, voting power checks, and audit records.

secrets.name: PRIVATE_KEY
secrets.description: Private key for the managed Ethereum account. Required for authorized sponsor, vote, process, summon, or proposal broadcast actions.
